description: Letter from Nissim b. Ḥalfon, from Tatai, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1065. The writer regrets that he does not have lacquer with his because there is a demand for it in Tetai. Also writes about collecting debts and a shipment of “lasin”. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #599) VMR
description_he: מכתב מניסים בן חלפון, מטטאי, לנהראי בן ניסים, פוסטאט, כ-1065, על ביקוש ללכה, גביית חובות ומשלוח לאסין
